import pytest
from myapp.cache import LRUCache

def test_cache_stores_entry():
    cache = LRUCache(max_size=100)
    cache.put("key1", "value1")
    assert cache.get("key1") == "value1"

def test_cache_evicts_oldest():
    cache = LRUCache(max_size=2)
    cache.put("a", 1)
    cache.put("b", 2)
    cache.put("c", 3)
    assert cache.get("a") is None
    assert cache.get("b") == 2
    assert cache.get("c") == 3

def test_user_password_hash():
    from myapp.auth import User
    user = User("alice")
    user.set_password("secret123")
    assert user.verify_password("secret123") is True
    assert user.verify_password("wrong") is False

def test_connection_pool_size():
    from myapp.db import ConnectionPool
    pool = ConnectionPool(dsn="postgres://localhost/test", size=5)
    conns = [pool.acquire() for _ in range(5)]
    assert pool.acquire() is None
    for conn in conns:
        pool.release(conn)
    assert pool.acquire() is not None
